basics.name: Aziz Rahmad
basics.label: Senior Software Developer
basics.summary: Experienced software engineer with a decade of experience delivering enterprise SaaS in payroll, HR, and logistics across APAC. Skilled in .NET with recent focus on AI/LLM workflow automation. Experienced in team onboarding and collaborative development, and designing end-to-end solutions that improve compliance and customer efficiency.

work.name: NTainers.co Pty Ltd
work.description: A logistics technology firm specializing in AI-driven automation and chat-based assistants for global supply chain operations.
work.summary: Maintain and enhance a platform that leverages artificial intelligence to optimize logistics operations, Supply Chain Management (SCM), and Transport Management Systems (TMS). Leading the development of AI-driven tools and integrations.
highlights: Led the development of Cargo Chat for Outlook, an AI-powered add-in for logistics query summarization and response generation.
Architected and implemented AI-powered integration platforms (Mappr.ai) for automated data mapping and workflow orchestration.
Integrated LLMs and Document Intelligence into automated data extraction processes within the core logistics platform.
Redesigned LLM pipeline, increasing response speed by 75%.

work.name: Primakara University
work.description: A premier IT-focused university in Bali dedicated to fostering innovation and preparing global-ready technology professionals.
work.summary: Delivering lectures on Computer Science topics, bridging academic theory with industry best practices.
highlights: Basics of Programming
Data Structures & Algorithms
Database Systems
Expert Systems

work.name: Mitrais (TechnologyOne Corp)
work.description: A leading software development service provider in Southeast Asia, specializing in enterprise SaaS and industrial software solutions.
work.summary: Developed high-quality software solutions for TechnologyOne's CiAnywhere SaaS, focusing on the HR and Payroll submodule for AU, NZ, and UK markets.
highlights: Implemented Australian STP & STP Phase 2 compliance requirements.
Developed Child Support payroll and IRD taxation calculations for New Zealand clients.
Successfully migrated legacy project libraries from VB.NET to C#.
Collaborated within cross-functional, international agile teams and assisted in onboarding new members.

work.name: CODE.ID (Bank Danamon Indonesia)
work.description: A premier software house and IT consultancy in Jakarta providing bespoke digital transformation and enterprise-grade solutions.
work.summary: Designed and managed various banking applications, focusing on tax automation and human resource management systems.
highlights: Developed the Corporate Tax module for processing fiscal reports.
Implemented Accrual & Prepayment modules for complex financial calculations.
Built the Industrial Relations module for managing employee performance and rule violations.

volunteer.organization: Wildfire Games (0 A.D. Open Source Project)
volunteer.summary: Implemented the 'Auto Queue' feature for the open-source RTS game 0 A.D., streamlining unit production workflows for players.
highlights: Developed automated unit training logic for town centers and barracks.
Collaborated with core developers to ensure feature alignment with game balance.

volunteer.summary: Translated and proofread students' gratitude letters to their donors.

projects.name: Cargo Chat for Outlook
projects.description: An Outlook add-in that integrates NTainers.co's Cargo Chat AI to summarize shipment emails, answer logistics queries, and generate smart replies directly in the inbox.
highlights: Developed the add-in with Node.JS TypeScript from scratch.
Developed AI chat interface for NTainers.co Cargo Chat API.
Utilized Office JavaScript API and ChatGPT to generate email replies in one click.
Performed extensive refactor on complex Cargo Chat logic by implementing SOLID principles.
Redesigned LLM pipeline, increasing response speed by 75%.

projects.name: Mappr.ai
projects.description: AI-powered integration platform that automates data mapping, transformation, and workflow orchestration, enabling seamless, no-code system interoperability in real time.
highlights: Bug fixes and improvements on Workflow Studio that generates API routes for data transformation using LLM.

projects.name: NTainers.co Logistics Portal
projects.description: AI-powered logistics & supply chain management web portal that integrates with CargoWise TMS.
highlights: Integrated Large Language Models and Document Intelligence into automated data extraction.
Developed the new Cartage Network Integration feature to facilitate automated integration processes between clients and freight forwarders or cartage companies.
Developed AI to UI feature that allows complex data to be processed by LLM to generate editable forms.
Developed Azure Function apps that facilitate AI-powered document extraction automations.

projects.name: CiAnywhere – Human Resources and Payroll
projects.description: Human Resource and Payroll submodule of CiAnywhere SaaS, tailored for diverse clients such as Australia, New Zealand, & Great Britain.
highlights: Implemented and maintained various business logic related to Human Resources and Payroll, particularly for Australia and New Zealand payroll and taxation.
Implemented STP (Single Touch Payroll) & STP Phase 2 for Australian clients.
Implemented Child Support payroll and IRD taxation calculation for New Zealand clients.
Upgraded the module from VB.NET-based to C#-based.

awards.title: Graduated Cum Laude
awards.summary: Achieved with a GPA of 3.69/4.00 in Master of Computer Science.

publications.name: Multiscale fractal dimension modelling on leaf venation topology pattern of Indonesian medicinal plants
publications.publisher: IEEE (2014 International Conference on Advanced Computer Science and Information Systems)
publications.summary: Developed a novel multiscale fractal dimension modelling approach for characterizing leaf venation topology to assist in medicinal plant identification.
